332 I8000J_ICD_10_CD I8000J_ICD_10_CD I8000J Additional Active Diagnoses: ICD 10 Code CHAR 8 This column contains ICD (International Classification of Diseases) code 10 for an additional active diagnoses in the last seven days.
333 J0100A_SCHLD_PAIN_MDCTN_CD J0100A_SCHLD_PAIN_MDCTN_CD J0100A Pain management: Scheduled Pain Medication Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident has been on a scheduled pain medication regimen in the past five days.
